description: Routine request for 2 units of A+ blood. Ample stock available across all types. No expiry concerns. Inventory will remain above safe thresholds after allocation. Single allocate_blood action is sufficient.

context.clinical_context: Pre-operative crossmatch for elective hip arthroplasty, patient Maria G., 68F. Surgery scheduled 2024-03-20 08:00. Blood bank technician has confirmed ABO/Rh typing: A Rh-positive. Two units crossmatched and held. No alloantibodies detected on antibody screen. Transfusion threshold: Hb <8 g/dL intra-operatively.
